case_title: JORGE ARNOLDO CHACON JAVIER VS. AARON JAMES SHURLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST TERMITE, INC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHACON JAVIER, JORGE ARNOLDO AS TO DEFENDANT SHURLEY, AARON JAMES
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHACON JAVIER, JORGE ARNOLDO AS TO DEFENDANT SHURLEY, AARON JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JORGE ARNOLDO CHACON JAVIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AARON JAMES SHURLEY IS PRESENT. COURT DISMISSED AARON JAMES SHURLEY AS NAMED DEFENDANT WITH PREJUDICE AND AMENDED TO ADD PACIFIC COAST TERMITE, INC AS DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT PACIFIC COST TERMITE, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH GRANDE (MANAGER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICES. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHACON JAVIER, JORGE ARNOLDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST TERMITE, INC $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, DEFENDANT AARON JAMES SHURLEY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0523B08D006, TAG # 037458 BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST TERMITE, INC
